title: Central bank policy rates - United States - Daily - End of period
compilation: From 19 Dec 1985 onwards: mid-point of the Federal Reserve target rate; from 1 Jul 1954 to 18 Dec 1985: US Fed Funds effective rate.

title: Central bank policy rates - Euro area - Daily - End of period
compilation: From 18 Sep 2024 onwards: official central bank steering rate is the deposit facility rate, fixed rate; from 15 Oct 2008 to 17 Sep 2024: official central bank liquidity providing, main refinancing operations, fixed rate; from 28 Jun 2000 to 14 Oct 2008: official central bank liquidity providing, main refinancing operations, minimum bid rate; from 5 Jan 1999 to 27 Jun 2000: official central bank liquidity providing, main refinancing operations, fixed rate.

title: Central bank policy rates - United Kingdom - Daily - End of period
compilation: From 3 Aug 2006 onwards: official bank rate; from 6 May 1997 to 2 Aug 2006: repo rate; from 20 Aug 1981 to 5 May 1997: minimum Bank of England Band 1 dealing rate; from 16 Oct 1972 to 19 Aug 1981: minimum lending rate; from 1 Jan 1946 to 15 Oct 1972: bank rate.

title: Central bank policy rates - Japan - Daily - End of period
compilation: From 22 Dec 2025 onwards: the BOJ encourages the uncollateralized overnight call rate to remain at around 0.75 percent; From 27 Jan 2025 to 21 Dec 2025: the BOJ encourages the uncollateralized overnight call rate to remain at around 0.50 percent; From 1 Aug 2024 to 26 Jan 2025: the BOJ encouraged the UOCR to remain at around 0.25% ; From 21 Mar 2024 to 31 July: the BOJ encouraged the UOCR to remain at around 0 to 0.1 %; from 21 Sep 2016 to 20 Mar 2024: the BOJ set the guideline for market operations which specifies a short-term policy interest rate at minus 0.1% and a target level of 10-year JGB yields at around 0%. Short-term policy interest rate; from 4 Apr 2013 to 20 Sep 2016: no policy rate; from 5 Oct 2010 to 3 Apr 2013: the BOJ encouraged the UOCR to remain at around 0 to 0.1%; from 19 Dec 2008 to 4 Oct 2010: the BOJ encouraged the UOCR to remain at around 0. %; from 31 Oct 2008 to 18 Dec 2008: the BOJ encouraged the UOCR to remain at around 0.3%; from 21 Feb 2007 to 30 Oct 2008: the BOJ encouraged the UOCR to remain at around 0.5%; before 21 Feb 2007, refer to https://data.bis.org/topics/CBPOL

title: Central bank policy rates - Switzerland - Daily - End of period
compilation: From 13 June 2019 onwards SNB Policy rate; From 1 Jan 2000 to 12 June 2019 mid-point of the SNB target range; from 1 Jan 1946 to 31 Dec 1999: discount rate.
